description_long: This rifle features a compact, modern design with a predominantly black body accented by vivid green highlights along the magazine and receiver. The weapon has a boxy, angular frame with a prominent rectangular upper receiver and a thick, cylindrical barrel assembly. The magazine is curved and detachable, colored in green with black edges, and fits into a well-defined magwell. The grip is ergonomic and integrated into the lower receiver, while the trigger guard is robust and squared. The rifle lacks a visible stock, giving it a submachine gun-like silhouette, and the sighting system appears to be a simple, low-profile iron sight. The surface finish is sleek and slightly glossy, suggesting a polymer or composite exterior with metallic internal components.
description: A compact, black rifle with green accents, a curved detachable magazine, and a sleek, modern design lacking a visible stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the black body, green-accented curved magazine, and the rectangular upper receiver.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the cylindrical barrel opening and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same green and black color scheme and the ergonomic grip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the receiver and the alignment of the barrel and magazine.
